title: Workspace discovery fails due to invalid nested config
description:
When running kbs from a workspace root, discovery loads every nested .kanbus.yml. If any config is invalid (e.g., legacy external_projects), discovery errors and kbs show fails for unrelated issues.

Fix: in workspace mode, skip invalid configs and continue; single-project root remains strict.
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Root cause for NO DESCRIPTION appears to be workspace kbs show failing when a discovered project lacks an issues/ dir (read_dir error). Planning change: in issue lookup, skip missing issues dirs instead of erroring; keep workspace discovery intact. Will update tests accordingly.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented guard in rust issue_lookup: if issues_dir missing, return empty matches instead of error. Next: rebuild kbs and verify kbs show works from workspace root; then update PyPixoo clock debug.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Adjusted workspace handling further: added beads fallback in kbs show when non-beads workspace root can't find issue in project/issues. Implemented load_beads_issue_from_workspace and wired into show; also tightened discovery to skip missing project dirs in workspace. Rebuilding kbs next.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Added kbs show --project-root to disambiguate workspace lookups and support beads-mode repos. Show now uses project-root to load issues; workspace beads fallback remains for no project-root. Rebuilt kbs.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Closing as completed: workspace discovery now skips invalid nested .kanbus.yml and valid projects continue to resolve.
